title: bus.hearth.session.activity v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's session_events module when a session's last_activity advances or message count increases. Coalesced to at most one event per second per session_id to prevent bus flooding during bursts. Consumers use this to refresh per-session timestamps on the phone UI.

last_message_at.description: ISO8601/RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent message in the session.

msg_count_delta.description: Change in message count since the last activity event.
